basic_details.job_title: NHSRC Lead Consultant - IT Division Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) Lead Consultant - IT Division Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NHSRC Lead Consultant - IT Division Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. (Computer Science / IT) / B.Tech (Computer Science / IT) / BCA / B.Sc. (IT) AND M.Tech (Computer Science / IT) / MCA / M.Sc. (Computer Science) / MBA, Minimum 10 years post-qualification experience in Information Technology with stakeholder management, system management, operations, working with States/UTs, minimum 2 years in public health/health sector
qualification.details: Lead Consultant - IT Division: Essential Qualification: B.E. (Computer Science / IT) / B.Tech (Computer Science / IT) / BCA / B.Sc. (IT) AND M.Tech (Computer Science / IT) / MCA / M.Sc. (Computer Science) / MBA. Essential Experience: Minimum 10 years post-qualification in IT including stakeholder management, system management and operations, working with States/UTs, minimum 2 years in public health/health sector. Desirable: Certifications in IT Quality, IT Governance, IT Risk Management, ISO 27001 etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHSRC Lead Consultant - IT Division Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHSRC Lead Consultant – IT Division recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NHSRC Lead Consultant – IT Division position is 12 May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Lead Consultant – IT Division post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Lead Consultant – IT Division post in the National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Lead Consultant – IT Division role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/IT, BCA, B.Sc. (IT) along with an M.Tech/MCA/M.Sc. (Computer Science) or MBA. Minimum 10 years of post-qualification experience in IT is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Lead Consultant – IT Division post is 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Lead Consultant – IT Division position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Lead Consultant – IT Division role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 1,30,000 to Rs. 1,70,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NHSRC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Lead Consultant – IT Division post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis for the position of Lead Consultant – IT Division.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the contract duration for this role?
faq.answer: The contract duration for the Lead Consultant – IT Division position is until 31 March 2028.
